name: glob
description: Find files matching a glob pattern (e.g., '**/*.py', 'src/**/*.ts'). Returns a list of matching file paths. Supports standard glob wildcards: * matches within a path segment, ** matches across segments, ? matches a single character, {a,b} matches either a or b.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match against. Examples: '**/*.py', 'src/**/*.ts', '*.{json,yaml}'.

base_dir.description: The base directory to search from. Defaults to the current working directory.

include_hidden.description: Whether to include hidden files and directories. Defaults to false.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 500.
